issue_summary: Introduced "MatrixDimensionMismatchException" to replace "InvalidMatrixException" whenever it was used to signal a row or column dimension mismatch. "MessageFactory": Fixed wrong order of appearance of general and specific messages.
code_before:
void setColumnMatrix(int column, FieldMatrix<T> matrix)
       throws MatrixIndexException, InvalidMatrixException;
javadoc_before: /** * Sets the entries in column number column * as a column matrix. Column indices start at 0. * * @param column the column to be set * @param matrix column matrix (must have one column and the same number of rows * as the instance) * @throws MatrixIndexException if the specified column index is invalid * @throws InvalidMatrixException if the matrix dimensions do not match one * instance column */
javadoc_after: /** * Sets the entries in column number column * as a column matrix. Column indices start at 0. * * @param column the column to be set * @param matrix column matrix (must have one column and the same number of rows * as the instance) * @throws MatrixIndexException if the specified column index is invalid * @throws org.apache.commons.math.exception.MatrixDimensionMismatchException * if the matrix dimensions do not match one instance column. */
